CustomObject.description: Static catalog entry for one Delivery Hub feature. Pairs with a runtime Feature__c row that carries enabled/disabled state, last-toggled metadata, and approval-routing. The mdt row defines the feature's identity (label, description, category, icon, settings-field link); the __c row is the per-tenant on/off + audit-trail. Layer 4 of the cockpit architecture.
CustomObject.label: Feature Definition
